landing.title: WhatsApp on Autopilot
landing.subtitle: Affordable WhatsApp Automation for Small Businesses in India
landing.feature_sheets: Edit Google Sheet, bot updates instantly
landing.trust: No credit card required · Cancel anytime
landing.hero_title_a: Make WhatsApp work for your shop —
landing.hero_subtitle: Auto-reply to customers, take orders, schedule pickups. In Hindi, English, Hinglish, Bengali, Urdu, Bhojpuri.
landing.no_card_cancel: No credit card · No setup fees · Cancel anytime
landing.reels_helper: Swipe / tap to switch industries. Same engine, every business.
landing.without_whatly_desc: Owner misses 30% of messages after 9 PM. Customers leave.
landing.with_whatly_desc: Bot replies 24×7. Orders flow in even while you sleep.
landing.uc_sub: One platform. Each business uses what they need.
landing.feat_title: Everything you need to run on WhatsApp
landing.feat_sub: No coding. No setup fees. No surprises.
landing.feat_reply_body: English, Hindi, Hinglish, Bengali, Urdu, Bhojpuri. Detects what your customer wrote, replies in same language.
landing.feat_sheets_body: No admin panels. Add new menu items or FAQs in your Sheet, bot syncs every 15 min.
landing.feat_orders_body: Customer says '2 atta'. Bot parses, calculates total, asks pickup time. Cash or UPI.
landing.feat_inbox_body: See all customer messages on your phone. Reply manually when bot doesn't know.
landing.feat_lang_body: Customer wrote Hindi? Replies in Hindi. Wrote Hinglish? Replies in Hinglish. Automatic.
landing.feat_ai_body: ₹699/mo. Smart fallback when no FAQ matches. Auto-translates English replies to customer's language.
landing.how_sub: From signup to first auto-reply. No tech skills needed.
landing.step1_body: Phone number → verify via WhatsApp → 14-day trial starts. No credit card.
landing.step2_body: One tap. Meta's official Embedded Signup. Your data stays yours.
landing.step3_body: 12 ready templates: price, timings, location, menu, etc. Edit the answers, done.
landing.step4_body: Bot replies 24/7 in customer's language. You see everything in the inbox.
landing.price_sub: Pay only what your shop uses. Cancel anytime.
landing.final_sub: Set up once. Sleep better. Your customers get instant replies — even at 2 AM.

hook.subtitle: Same shop · same customers · different outcome.

without.headline: 8 customers left tonight
without.subhead: Owner sleeping. Phone vibrating. Nobody replied.

with.headline: Owner asleep. Bot runs the shop.
with.subhead: Every message answered. Orders queued for morning.

without.headline: Sunday: closed. Bookings? Also closed.
without.subhead: 8 brides messaged. None heard back. Booked elsewhere.
chats: want to book a haircut today

with.headline: Sunday off, but appointments still roll in.
with.subhead: Bot books slots from your sheet. Monday — calendar full.
chats: want to book a haircut today

without.headline: Kitchen + phone + delivery — something slips
without.subhead: Owner cooking. WhatsApp piling up. Orders go to Swiggy.

with.headline: Cook the food. Bot handles the rest.
with.subhead: Menu auto-sent. UPI link auto-sent. ETA auto-tracked.

signup.title: Sign up free

verify.title: Verify via WhatsApp
verify.instruction: Tap the button below — WhatsApp will open with a pre-filled message. Just hit send.

onboarding.business_subtitle: Takes 30 seconds. You can edit anything later.
onboarding.whatsapp_subtitle: Link your Meta WhatsApp Business so we can send auto-replies on your behalf.
onboarding.intents_subtitle: We pre-filled 12 common questions. Edit any reply, toggle off what doesn't apply.
onboarding.done_subtitle: {name} is ready to receive WhatsApp messages on autopilot.

inbox.empty_all_hint: Customer messages will show up here.

sheets.subtitle: Edit a sheet → bot updates instantly
sheets.step_1: Create a Google Sheet with FAQs / menu / services
sheets.step_2: Share it with our service account (view access)
sheets.step_4: Edit your sheet anytime — auto-syncs every 15 min
sheets.empty_hint: Connect a Google Sheet to auto-sync your FAQs, menu, or services.
